headline: We are seeing a 'K-shaped economy' in housing, says Zelman’s Alan Ratner
summary: Alan Ratner, managing director at Zelman, joins ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss the impact of higher mortgage rates on homebuilders, whether housing is also seeing a 'K-shaped economy,' and more.

raw.headline: We are seeing a 'K-shaped economy' in housing, says Zelman’s Alan Ratner

headline: Cramer On DoorDash: 'They Just Want Semis' — Uber, Reddit, Zscaler Caught In The Same Rotation
summary: Jim Cramer recommends buying DoorDash (DASH), Uber (UBER), Reddit (RDDT), and Leidos Holdings (LDOS). Flex (FLEX) could go up 50%.

headline: PulteGroup (PHM) Valuation Check After Mixed Short Term Returns And Slower Momentum
summary: What PulteGroup’s recent performance tells you PulteGroup (PHM) has been moving in different directions across timeframes, with the stock up 1.2% on the day and 6.1% over the past week, but down 7.6% over the past month. See our latest analysis for PulteGroup. Looking beyond the recent pullback, PulteGroup’s 1 year total shareholder return of 18.11% and 3 year total shareholder return of 80.82% contrast with weaker 3 month and year to date share price returns.
